Keep support non-gating

Official builds stay free to download and use. Patreon support remains a quiet external link with no tiers, feature gates, activation checks, supporter-only core functionality, or runtime support verification.

Home / Decisions
DecisionFor everyone distributionsupportproduct

Context

Prism currently uses optional support rather than paid access, and public copy must not imply that core use depends on an account or subscription.

Decision

Official builds stay free to download and use. Patreon support remains a quiet external link with no tiers, feature gates, activation checks, supporter-only core functionality, or runtime support verification.

Consequences

Product surfaces can mention support only as optional patronage. Launch docs and release copy should keep download, privacy, and limitation language clearer than the support ask.

Related files

  • docs/product-worthy-launch.md
  • README.md
